violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Box on the floor of the walk in freezer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Some dust buildup on the ceiling vents.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing above the pop boxes exposing the attic. Trim on ceiling above food prep table is falling down.

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. -Meatballs in the hot hold were at 120 F.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
